text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's state television broadcast said that the United States' "demanding too much" was an obstacle to reaching an agreement. The report said the major sticking points were the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's rights to enrich uranium, and "other issues." "Despite various creative approaches by the Iranian team, the Americans' overreach and unreasonable demands prevented talks from advancing," the state television report said
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗国家电视台广播称，美国“要求过多”是达成协议的障碍。报道称，主要的症结在于霍尔木兹海峡的开放、伊朗铀浓缩的权利以及“其他问题”。国家电视台的报道称：“尽管伊朗团队采取了各种创造性的方法，但美国人的越权和无理要求阻碍了谈判的进展。”

text: WarTranslated Parliamentary elections have started in Hungary. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 匈牙利议会选举已经开始。 推文

text: WarTranslated US Vice President JD Vance said talks lasting over 21 hours produced no deal. He said Iran wouldn’t accept US terms or budge on key demands, including its nuclear program. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043209330049126478/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 美国副总统JD·万斯表示，持续超过21小时的谈判没有达成任何协议。他说，伊朗不会接受美国的条款，也不会在包括其核计划在内的关键要求上让步。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043209330049126478/video/1 推文

text: Reporter: Precisely, what have they rejected here? JD Vance: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 记者：他们在这里究竟拒绝了什么？JD·万斯：我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求能够使他们迅速获得核武器的工具。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Bloomberg: Two oil tankers have turned back in the Strait of Hormuz following the failure of US-Iranian talks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 彭博社：美伊谈判失败后，两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: The days of our military sending 70 cents of every dollar to the United States are over.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼：我们军队将每一美元中的70美分送往美国的时代已经结束了。

text: JD Vance: Whatever shortcomings the negotiations had, it wasn’t because of the Pakistanis, who did an amazing job and sincerely tried to help us and the Iranians bridge the gap and reach a deal.
text_zh: JD·万斯：无论谈判有什么缺点，都不是因为巴基斯坦人，他们做得非常出色，并真诚地试图帮助我们和伊朗弥合分歧并达成协议。

text: JD Vance: We’ve had a number of substantive discussions with the Iranians. That’s the good news. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement — and I think that’s bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我们与伊朗人进行了多次实质性讨论。这是好消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议——我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更糟糕的消息。

text: Trump attended a UFC event in Florida while talks with Iran collapsed in Pakistan.
text_zh: 特朗普在佛罗里达州参加UFC赛事，而与伊朗的谈判在巴基斯坦破裂。

text: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Pakistani Foreign Minister: We hope that both the American and Iranian sides will continue to adhere to the ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 巴基斯坦外交部长：我们希望美伊双方继续遵守停火协议。

text: Trump reposts after failed talks with Iran: The Trump card the president holds if Iran won’t bend: a naval blockade.
text_zh: 特朗普在与伊朗谈判失败后转发：如果伊朗不屈服，总统手中掌握的王牌：海军封锁。

text: WarTranslated April 11 was just the start of the Easter POW exchange, with more releases ahead, says Andriy Yusov, deputy head of Ukraine’s POW coordination HQ. He adds humanitarian initiatives were rejected, but the work goes on. Reports of a 175 for 175 POW swap. Awaiting official confirmation. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰战俘协调总部副负责人安德里·尤索夫表示，4月11日只是复活节战俘交换的开始，未来还会有更多人获释。他补充说，人道主义倡议被拒绝了，但工作仍在继续。有报道称进行了175对175的战俘交换。等待官方确认。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: WarTranslated Former Roscosmos chief Dmitry Rogozin said he’d beat the US and be the first to land Russians on the Moon, but then deleted the post. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043208138409542027/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 前俄罗斯航天局局长德米特里·罗戈津曾表示，他将击败美国，成为第一个让俄罗斯人登上月球的人，但随后删除了该帖子。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043208138409542027/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Despite the so-called ceasefire, Russians killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Hulyaipilske with FPV drones yesterday around 17:30, DeepState reports. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043207304367984735/video/1 An hour after the truce began, Russian propagandists predictably claim "Ukraine broke it by hitting Nova Kakhovka." https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据DeepState报道，尽管有所谓的停火，俄罗斯人昨天17:30左右在Hulyaipilske附近用FPV无人机杀害了一个乌克兰撤离小组。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043207304367984735/video/1 停火开始一小时后，俄罗斯宣传人员不出所料地声称“乌克兰通过袭击新卡霍夫卡破坏了停火”。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Esmaeil Baghaei, Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, said there was no expectation of a deal with the United States, citing “an atmosphere of mistrust” after weeks of war. “We should not have expected an agreement in just one meeting,” he said, adding that while some common ground was found, “on two, three key topics there were significant differences.”
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，由于数周战争后的“不信任气氛”，对与美国达成协议不抱期望。他说：“我们不应该期望在一次会议上就达成协议”，并补充说，虽然找到了一些共同点，但“在两三个关键议题上存在重大分歧”。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia announced the deployment of around 13,000 Pakistani troops and 10 to 18 Pakistan Air Force fighter jets to King Abdulaziz Air Base in the Eastern Sector under their joint strategic defence agreement. A Pakistani government official also confirmed the move, stating it is part of their defence pact under which an attack on one country would be treated as an attack on the other. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 沙特阿拉伯宣布，根据其联合战略防御协议，在东部战区向阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地部署约13,000名巴基斯坦军队和10至18架巴基斯坦空军战斗机。一位巴基斯坦政府官员也证实了这一举动，称这是其防御条约的一部分，根据该条约，对一个国家的攻击将被视为对另一个国家的攻击。 @wfwitness

text: After 21 hours of negotiations in Pakistan, JD Vance said the U.S. and Iran failed to reach an agreement. He said the U.S. made its terms clear, but Iran did not accept them.
text_zh: 在巴基斯坦进行了21小时的谈判后，JD·万斯表示美国和伊朗未能达成协议。他说美国明确了自己的条款，但伊朗没有接受。

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Trump shares on Truth an article stating that he can impose a naval blockade on Iran https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043187782072389899/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 特朗普在Truth上分享了一篇文章，称他可以对伊朗实施海军封锁 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043187782072389899/photo/1 推文

text: While the war may resume at any moment, it’s important to reiterate that the U.S. has no cards left to play besides bombing civilian infrastructure (terrorism). The world is now starting to feel the effects of the Hormuz blockade, but there’s still another card Iran hasn’t activated yet; the Bab al-Mandeb. Iran’s allies in Yemen (Ansarallah) have already demonstrated their ability to shut down the Bab al-Mandeb Strait from 2023 to 2025 in response to the Israeli genocide in Gaza, which both Biden and Trump attempted to reopen but failed, miserably.
text_zh: 虽然战争可能随时恢复，但必须重申，美国除了轰炸民用基础设施（恐怖主义）外，已经没有牌可打了。世界现在开始感受到霍尔木兹封锁的影响，但伊朗还有一张牌尚未激活；曼德海峡。伊朗在也门的盟友（胡塞武装）已经证明了他们在2023年至2025年期间有能力关闭曼德海峡，以回应以色列在加沙的种族灭绝，拜登和特朗普都试图重新开放，但都惨败了。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump’s first social media post following failed peace talks with Iran is a link to an article suggesting a possible naval blockade on Iran if it does not comply with U.S. demands. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在与伊朗和平谈判失败后的第一条社交媒体帖子是一个链接，指向一篇文章，建议如果伊朗不遵守美国的要求，可能对其进行海军封锁。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said it carried out a strike overnight on a Hezbollah rocket launcher in southern Lebanon that was loaded and ready to fire toward Israel. The launcher was identified in the Juwaya area and was destroyed in a rapid strike before it could be launched. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，昨晚对黎巴嫩南部的一个真主党火箭发射器进行了打击，该发射器已装弹并准备向以色列发射。发射器在朱瓦亚地区被发现，并在发射前被迅速摧毁。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump is sharing articles floating a US naval blockade of Iran, the "Venezuela playbook," after talks fail. Here's what that would actually look like. The idea is the US Navy takes control of the Strait of Hormuz and Kharg Island strangling Iran's economy while cutting China and India off from their key oil source simultaneously. The problem: Iran is not Venezuela. 🔸 The strait is only 33km wide at its narrowest point, every ship that enters is within range of Iran's entire coastal arsenal 🔸 Iran's Khalij Fars anti-ship ballistic missiles have a 300km range and are designed specifically to hit moving ships at sea 🔸 Noor and Qader cruise missiles, fired from mobile launchers hidden in coastal caves, cover the entire strait from the Iranian shoreline 🔸 Iran has an estimated 5,000-6,000 naval mines — including influence mines that sit on the seabed and are nearly impossible to detect 🔸 IRGC fast attack swarm boats are designed specifically to overwhelm US destroyers in confined waters — a classified DoD war game found the US lost 16 major warships including a carrier to Iranian swarm tactics 🔸 Iran controls three fortified island outposts (Larak, Qeshm and Abu Musa) sitting directly on the shipping lanes, each with underground bunkers and missile batteries Iran doesn't even need to win a naval battle, FPRI experts note Iran is running an "insurance blockade," it only needs to strike occasionally to make insurance uneconomical for commercial shipping. That alone shuts the strait down. Mine clearance in a contested environment takes a minimum of 4 weeks, and the US has decommissioned most of its dedicated minesweepers in CENTCOM. In 1991 it took 40 ships four months to clear Iraqi minefields in a permissive environment. Meanwhile the USS Gerald R. Ford, cited in the article as leading the blockade, is currently in Split, Croatia being repaired after Iranian strikes. The USS George H.W. Bush is en route as replacement. Trump may be out-blockaded before the blockade even starts. Source . 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普正在分享文章，在谈判失败后散布美国对伊朗进行海军封锁的“委内瑞拉剧本”。这就是实际情况。这个想法是美国海军控制霍尔木兹海峡和哈尔克岛，扼杀伊朗经济，同时切断中国和印度对关键石油来源的获取。问题是：伊朗不是委内瑞拉。 🔸 海峡最窄处仅33公里宽，每艘进入的船只都在伊朗整个海岸武库的射程内 🔸 伊朗的“波斯湾”反舰弹道导弹射程为300公里，专门用于打击海上的移动船只 🔸 从隐藏在沿海洞穴中的移动发射器发射的“努尔”和“卡德尔”巡航导弹覆盖了整个海峡 🔸 伊朗估计有5,000-6,000枚海军水雷——包括放置在海床上几乎无法探测的影响水雷 🔸 伊斯兰革命卫队快艇群专门设计用于在狭窄水域压制美国驱逐舰——一份机密的国防部战争游戏发现，美国因伊朗的蜂群战术损失了16艘大型军舰，包括一艘航母 🔸 伊朗控制着三个直接位于航道上的防御岛屿前哨（拉拉克岛、格什姆岛和阿布穆萨岛），每个岛屿都有地下掩体和导弹连 伊朗甚至不需要赢得海战，FPRI专家指出，伊朗正在进行“保险封锁”，它只需要偶尔进行打击，使商业航运的保险变得不经济。仅此一项就足以关闭海峡。在有争议的环境中清除水雷至少需要4周时间，而美国已经退役了中央司令部的大部分专用扫雷舰。1991年，40艘船花了四个月时间才在许可环境中清除伊拉克的雷区。与此同时，文章中提到的领导封锁的“杰拉尔德·福特”号航空母舰目前正在克罗地亚斯普利特维修，此前遭到了伊朗的打击。乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰正在途中作为替代品。特朗普可能在封锁开始前就被反封锁了。来源 。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Polls have opened in Hungary’s national elections, with Prime Minister Viktor Orbán facing challenger Péter Magyar after 16 years of Orbán’s rule. Orbán leads the ruling Fidesz party, and has built his platform around nationalist policies and a confrontational stance toward the European Union. Magyar, running as the main opposition challenger backed by the TISZA Party, has positioned himself as a reformist figure calling for institutional change and a tougher stance on corruption. Polling stations are set to close at 7 p.m. local time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利全国选举投票站已经开放，总理维克托·欧尔班在执政16年后正面临挑战者彼得·马扎尔。欧尔班领导执政的青民盟，并围绕民族主义政策和对欧盟的对抗立场建立了他的纲领。马扎尔作为由TISZA党支持的主要反对派挑战者参选，将自己定位为呼吁制度变革和对腐败采取更强硬立场的改革派人物。投票站定于当地时间晚上7点关闭。 @wfwitness

text: 🇹🇷 💬 🇮🇱 'Isn't this a form of apartheid?' - Erdogan criticizes new Israel death penalty for Palestinians 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇹🇷 💬 🇮🇱 “这不是一种种族隔离吗？” - 埃尔多安批评以色列对巴勒斯坦人实施新的死刑 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Al Mayadeen analyst Musa Assi: Vance's uranium/nuclear weapons excuse is "very weak and cannot be believed." Iran has repeatedly said it doesn't want nuclear weapons and is ready to reduce enrichment to very low levels for civilian use. Everyone is convinced Iran does not have the intention to produce a nuclear weapon. The real reasons for failure: 1. Israel succeeded in sabotaging negotiations by insisting on continuing the war on Lebanon, violating the ceasefire that Trump had agreed to as a precondition. 2. The US chose "Israel first" not "America first." Vance called Trump ten times in 21 hours, showing he lacked full authority. The American negotiating team chose Israeli interests over American interests and peace. Failure may take us back to before the ceasefire. The military option is still on the table. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 Al Mayadeen分析师穆萨·阿西：万斯关于铀/核武器的借口“非常软弱，不可信”。伊朗多次表示不想要核武器，并准备将浓缩水平降低到民用使用的极低水平。每个人都确信伊朗没有生产核武器的意图。失败的真正原因：1. 以色列通过坚持继续对黎巴嫩的战争，违反了特朗普作为先决条件同意的停火协议，成功破坏了谈判。2. 美国选择了“以色列优先”而不是“美国优先”。万斯在21小时内给特朗普打了十次电话，显示他缺乏完全的权力。美国谈判团队选择了以色列利益而不是美国利益与和平。失败可能会让我们回到停火之前。军事选项仍然摆在桌面上。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 红色警报器在以色列北部对抗线地区响起。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 无人机警报器在以色列北部对抗线地区激活。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 红色警报器在以色列北部对抗线地区响起。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical Notably, the US continued to deliver munitions to RAF Fairford after the ceasefire earlier this week, and the forward-based bomber fleet is still present and armed. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043176885249507768/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 值得注意的是，本周早些时候停火后，美国继续向费尔福德皇家空军基地运送弹药，前沿部署的轰炸机机队仍然存在并处于武装状态。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043176885249507768/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ The Iranian delegation left Pakistan
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 伊朗代表团离开巴基斯坦

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. Who are you with? Reporter: NBC News. Trump: NBC? That’s fake news.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 记者：伊朗没有听取你们关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。你是哪里的？记者：NBC新闻。特朗普：NBC？那是假新闻。
